Supported Types

On this page

Installation ​

Package Managers ​

For first, add package to your package manager:

toml
[dependencies]
Wisp = "maneetoo/wisp@0.1.0"
toml
[dependencies]
warp = { name = "maneetoo/wisp", version = "0.1.0" }
bash
pesde add maneetoo/wisp

Now run this:

bash
wally install
bash
pesde install

Manual ​

  1. Get the .rbxm file from the GitHub
  2. Import the .rbxm file into Roblox Studio manually
Pager
